npcs.name: Makino
npcs.hint: Restores morale and points new pirates toward starter quests.
dialogue: You look ready to sail, but every legend starts with small steps.
Foosha may be quiet, but the hills have been restless lately.

npcs.name: Mayor Woop Slap
dialogue: Do not go chasing trouble unless you can protect the people behind you.
A real captain takes responsibility, not just treasure.

npcs.name: Rika
npcs.quest_hint: Investigate the corrupt Marine holding cells.
dialogue: The Marines here are not all bad... but the base scares people.
I saw bounty posters being changed after dark.

npcs.name: Base Blacksmith
npcs.hint: Sells early weapons and repairs gear.
npcs.quest_hint: Bring iron scraps from Marine storage.
dialogue: A dull blade gets people hurt. Keep your weapon clean.
The base has crates of iron, but good luck getting permission.

npcs.name: Mayor Boodle
npcs.quest_hint: Recover stolen town treasure from clown pirates.
dialogue: This town has been knocked down before. We rebuild every time.
Those pirates stole more than gold. They stole peace.

npcs.name: Pet Food Shop Owner
dialogue: Even in a wrecked town, someone has to keep the shelves stocked.
If you find canned food in the rubble, bring it here.

npcs.name: Kaya
dialogue: Please be careful. The village smiles, but something feels wrong.
A kind heart can still be brave.

npcs.name: Merry
dialogue: A ship should carry dreams, not just cargo.
Good wood, good nails, and good friends. That is how a ship survives.

npcs.name: Zeff
npcs.quest_hint: Defeat rowdy diners without damaging the restaurant.
dialogue: Hungry fighters lose. Eat before you talk big.
A cook's hands are for feeding people, but they can still kick fools out.

npcs.name: Patty
npcs.quest_hint: Deliver meals during a pirate attack.
dialogue: You pay first, then you eat. Pirate, Marine, I don't care.
The sea brings customers and problems. Mostly problems.

npcs.name: Nojiko
npcs.quest_hint: Weaken fish-man patrols around the village.
dialogue: People here have suffered long enough.
If you fight them, fight smart. They know this island better than you.

npcs.name: Genzo
dialogue: Courage is not loud. Sometimes it is standing your ground anyway.
The park's enforcers move in groups. Don't get surrounded.

npcs.name: Loguetown Broker
npcs.hint: Sells rare rumors and high-tier contracts.
npcs.quest_hint: Collect proof from elite pirate crews.
dialogue: Everything has a price in Loguetown. Even a dream.
The Grand Line eats rookies. Buy information before you buy glory.

npcs.name: Marine Captain Smoker
npcs.quest_hint: Only strong pirates survive his attention.
dialogue: Pirates always talk about freedom. Most just mean chaos.
If you're sailing for the Grand Line, prove you're not another fool.
